source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/06_(Retrofit) HnX-R1/05_설계개발 검증 및 유효성 확인/06_Risk Management/23G series/Attachment 1 - Life Cycle Report (Doc.No.A-TCF-5-128).docx

document.title: Life Cycle Report for A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Life cycle report for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector accessories, estimating ESL at about 5 years.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports design development risk management documentation by defining life cycle basis, frequency of use, and expected service life for the listed detector accessories.
keyPoints: The document states it is the life cycle of A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW.
Performance and usage are stated to be the same except for size.
Life cycle basis uses estimated life of KMG Series capacitor from Samyoung Electronics and capacitor estimated life calculation.
Average daily use is less than 9 hours per day.
Reasonably foreseeable worst usage is 24 hours a day with a battery charger plugged in.
ESL is stated as about 5 years.

evidence.claim: A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW can be selected among accessories of the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Among the accessories of the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector can be selected between A1717MCW, A1417MCW and F1417MCW.
evidence.pageTarget: Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector Accessories

evidence.claim: Performance and usage are the same except for size.
evidence.evidenceText: Performance and usage are all the same except for size. (A-TCF -5-127)
evidence.pageTarget: A1717MCW A1417MCW F1417MCW Performance And Usage

evidence.claim: The Power Supply Box component model is DEPS9601 from Daean Elecom Co. Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Part key - Power Supply Box Model Name ... DEPS9601 ... Vendor Daean Elecom Co. Ltd

evidence.claim: The life cycle basis uses the estimated life of a KMG Series capacitor from Samyoung Electronics.
evidence.evidenceText: Estimated life of KMG Series capacitor from Samyoung Electronics.

evidence.claim: The capacitor estimated life formula is L = L0 x 2^((Tmax - Ta)/10).
evidence.evidenceText: Capacitor estimated life calculation L = L0 x 2^((Tmax - Ta)/10)

evidence.claim: The assumed calculated result is 45,254.8 hours.
Average daily use is less than 9 hours per day.
evidence.evidenceText: Average daily use : Less than 9 hours per day

evidence.claim: Reasonably foreseeable worst usage is 24 hours a day with a battery charger plugged in.
evidence.evidenceText: Reasonably foreseeable worst usage : Using for 24 hours a day with a battery charger plugged in

evidence.claim: The expected service life is about 5 years.
